parties: John Michael Davidson (Party A) [SOURCE: handwritten_settlement_scan.png, Page 1]
Williams & Associates LLC (Party B) [SOURCE: handwritten_settlement_scan.png, Page 1]
case_fact_summary.summary: This settlement agreement was executed on March 15, 2024, to resolve all outstanding disputes arising from a contract dated January 10, 2023, between John Michael Davidson and Williams & Associates LLC [SOURCE: handwritten_settlement_scan.png, Page 1]. Under the terms of the agreement, Party A shall pay Party B a total sum of $125,000, divided into two equal installments of $62,500 [SOURCE: handwritten_settlement_scan.png, Page 1]. The first installment is due by April 1, 2024, while the deadline for the second installment is partially illegible, recorded as 'by 1,2024' [SOURCE: handwritten_settlement_scan.png, Page 1]. Upon completion of the full payment, Party B will release all claims against Party A related to the original January 10, 2023 contract [SOURCE: handwritten_settlement_scan.png, Page 1]. The agreement is governed by California law and stipulates that any disputes must be resolved through mediation before either party may pursue litigation [SOURCE: handwritten_settlement_scan.png, Page 1].
timeline: January 10, 2023: Date of the original contract [SOURCE: handwritten_settlement_scan.png, Page 1]

[ILLEGIBLE] 1, 2024: Deadline for the second installment of $62,500 [SOURCE: handwritten_settlement_scan.png, Page 1]
